evals.prompt: Explore this codebase at /Users/me/project and tell me how it works. I just joined the team and need to understand the architecture. Generate all the exploration docs.
evals.expected_output: A full set of exploration docs (discover.md, architecture.md, glossary.md, onboarding.md, diagrams/) plus exploration-report.html, all written to project/docs/exploration/. Includes directory tree, request flow trace, entity map, and learning path.

evals.prompt: I have no idea what this repo does. Can you map it out for me?
evals.expected_output: The skill triggers and starts Phase 1 (Discover) to establish directory structure, then launches parallel agents. Output includes a knowledge map, architecture deep-dive, and onboarding guide.

evals.prompt: Trace a complete request through the system in /Users/me/microservice-app. I need to know every component, every guard, and every data store involved. Also generate a diagram.
evals.expected_output: architecture.md with full request flow trace (frontend → gateway → auth → service → DB → response), Mermaid sequence diagram in diagrams/flow.mmd, and component interaction table.

evals.prompt: What parts of /Users/me/large-monorepo can I safely ignore as a new developer?
evals.expected_output: onboarding.md with P0/P1/P2 priority ranking, 'safe to ignore' section with specific directory paths, and top-5-files-to-read-first.

evals.prompt: Fix this bug in /Users/me/project — the login endpoint returns 500.
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger. The agent should handle this as a normal bug-fix task without loading the codebase-explorer skill.
